title: Relational Model Constraints Hierarchy
description: A visual breakdown of the key constraints in the relational model, showing their hierarchy and how they enforce data integrity within a relational database schema.
relationships: Domain Constraints define valid values for Attributes
Key Constraints uniquely identify Tuples within a Relation
Entity Integrity ensures Primary Keys are not null
Referential Integrity ensures Foreign Keys match existing Primary Keys
All constraints are defined within a Database Schema
